result.stdout:
USAGE: release-notes [--help] --version <string> [--token <string>]
                     [--label <label> <description>] [--oldversion <string>]
                     [--releasetagformat <string>]
                     [--releaselabelformat <string>]
                     [--backportlabelformat <string>]
                     [--format <markdown|asciidoc>]
                     [--uncategorizedheader <string>] [--output <string>]
                     [<subcommand> [<options>]] <owner> <repository name>

REPOSITORY:

    <owner> <repository name>
                          Repository to use in <owner> <repos_name> format

SUBCOMMANDS:

    apply-labels          Creates version and backport labels
    find-previous         Find the previous release for the passed version
    current-version <options>
                          Given search syntax finds the current and the next
                          versions on separate lines
    create-release <options>
                          Makes sure the tag exists as release on github and
                          introduces new version labels for the next
                          major/minor/patch

    Use 'release-notes <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --version <string>    Version that is being released
    --token <string>      The github token to use, if the issue list is long
                          this may be necessary, defaults to anonymous
    --label <label> <description>
                          Map Github labels to categorizations, format <label>
                          <description>, can be specified multiple times
    --oldversion <string> The previous version to generate release notes since,
                          optional the tool will find the previous release
    --releasetagformat <string>
                          The release tag format, defaults to VERSION, VERSION
                          will be replaced by the actual version
    --releaselabelformat <string>
                          The release label format, defaults to vVERSION,
                          VERSION will be replaced by the actual version
    --backportlabelformat <string>
                          The backport label format, defaults to 'Backport
                          BRANCH`, BRANCH will be calculated from the version
    --format <markdown|asciidoc>
                          The format in which to print the results, can be
                          markdown and asciidoc
    --uncategorizedheader <string>
                          The header to use in the markdown for uncategorized
                          issues/prs
    --output <string>     write the release notes to a file as well as standard
                          out, VERSION will be replaced by the actual version
    --help                display this list of options.

result.stdout:
USAGE: release-notes create-release [--help] [--body <string>]

OPTIONS:

    --body <string>       Path to file that will be read and used for the body
                          for the release, can be specified multiple times to
                          combine
    <owner> <repository name>
                          Repository to use in <owner> <repos_name> format
    --version <string>    Version that is being released
    --token <string>      The github token to use, if the issue list is long
                          this may be necessary, defaults to anonymous
    --label <label> <description>
                          Map Github labels to categorizations, format <label>
                          <description>, can be specified multiple times
    --releasetagformat <string>
                          The release tag format, defaults to VERSION, VERSION
                          will be replaced by the actual version
    --releaselabelformat <string>
                          The release label format, defaults to vVERSION,
                          VERSION will be replaced by the actual version
    --backportlabelformat <string>
                          The backport label format, defaults to 'Backport
                          BRANCH`, BRANCH will be calculated from the version
    --help                display this list of options.

result.stdout:
USAGE: release-notes current-version [--help] [--query <string>]

OPTIONS:

    --query <string>      An anchor query, M.N, M.x, or master. will find the
                          current and next patch, minor, major respectfully
    <owner> <repository name>
                          Repository to use in <owner> <repos_name> format
    --version <string>    Version that is being released
    --token <string>      The github token to use, if the issue list is long
                          this may be necessary, defaults to anonymous
    --label <label> <description>
                          Map Github labels to categorizations, format <label>
                          <description>, can be specified multiple times
    --releasetagformat <string>
                          The release tag format, defaults to VERSION, VERSION
                          will be replaced by the actual version
    --releaselabelformat <string>
                          The release label format, defaults to vVERSION,
                          VERSION will be replaced by the actual version
    --backportlabelformat <string>
                          The backport label format, defaults to 'Backport
                          BRANCH`, BRANCH will be calculated from the version
    --help                display this list of options.
